metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE Build Agent that, given a language-mixed prompt from a nontechnical business owner in Africa, produces a governed memory_engrave artifact with explicit validation gates, compiling into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE Build Agent that, given a language-mixed prompt from a nontechnical business owner in Africa, produces a governed memory_engrave artifact with explicit validation gates, compiling into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.
mission.success_definition: Agent produces a valid SR8 artifact with all five sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).; Validation gates are documented and traceable in the output.; Artifact compiles without error in SR8 runtime.; Chaotic input is normalized without loss of intent.

in_scope.item: The agent shall accept a chaotic input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), parse it through the operator_lens, and output a structured SR8-compilable artifact. The agent must enforce validation gates at each stage: input normalization, constraint extraction, criteria disambiguation, and output formatting.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent produces a valid SR8 artifact with all five sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are documented and traceable in the output.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Artifact compiles without error in SR8 runtime.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Chaotic input is normalized without loss of intent.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.build_objective: Build an SRX ACE Build Agent that, given a language-mixed prompt from a nontechnical business owner in Africa, produces a governed memory_engrave artifact with explicit validation gates, compiling into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

target_changes.item: The agent shall accept a chaotic input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), parse it through the operator_lens, and output a structured SR8-compilable artifact. The agent must enforce validation gates at each stage: input normalization, constraint extraction, criteria disambiguation, and output formatting.

implementation_steps.item: The agent shall accept a chaotic input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), parse it through the operator_lens, and output a structured SR8-compilable artifact. The agent must enforce validation gates at each stage: input normalization, constraint extraction, criteria disambiguation, and output formatting.

validation_gates.item: Agent produces a valid SR8 artifact with all five sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).
Validation gates are documented and traceable in the output.
Artifact compiles without error in SR8 runtime.
Chaotic input is normalized without loss of intent.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
